title: Bullets Recipes
description: More fun ways to make food!
body:
I have started my journey in cooking new and unseen products. Come join me and have a taste of what my recipes have to offer! Follow along as I improve my craft and bring new ways to enjoy food in Minecraft.
![Beginner Cook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/626b8be1e39a2f6578acb364963f2ca2614d07a2.jpeg)
[First Build] The Newbie: (Ready)
Marvel upon my first recipe! A piece of bread and your choice of food item! Together they will bring many flavors to be desired. But beware! Bad ingredients will become worse when put together!

![Tropical Fish Golden Carrot Bread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57f9d0eb745e0ce1c92b32acd1d6221a532c9c0c.png)
![Pufferfish Bread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4da053f3e7e488b9af7e8e26c949d7a79904ea.png)

[Second Build] The Beginner Cook: (ready) 
You can now use your tools to get creative with your cooking. Axes and pickaxes can be used to cut and crush foods to get interesting results.
Added: Axe-ables: sliced_bread,pork_strips,cod_fillet, chicken_fillet,potato_wedges,carrot_sticks, diced_beef Pickaxe-ables: bread_crumbs,ground_beef,ground_pork, minced_cod,ground_chicken,mashed_potatoes, smashed_carrots Sword-ables: bagel New Foods: beef_patty,pork_patty,chicken_patty, raw_kofte,kofte,raw_fishcake, fishcake,bacon,grilled_cod,grilled_chicken, steak_chunks
